assertions.title: Добавьте в форму радиокнопку с именем `question-one`.
assertions.name: seteTableBorderAttrTo5

scripts.handler: e.preventDefault(); const params = [...document.querySelectorAll('form input:not([type=submit]):not([type=radio]:not(:checked)), form select, form textarea')].map((input) => `${encodeURI(input.name)}=${encodeURI(input.type === 'chcekbox' ? input.checked : input.value)}`).join('&'); window.location = '/resources/12/assets/submitted-form.html?' + params;
